stories.title: Love her or hate her, Sophie Cunningham won't be ignored
stories.summary: Without a starting role and without apology, the Fever guard has become a star and a dividing line.

stories.title: Fins, All-Pro LB Brooks reach $51.3M extension
stories.summary: The Dolphins and linebacker Jordyn Brooks have agreed to a three-year, $51.3 million extension with $35 million guaranteed, agent Erik Burkhardt told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

stories.title: Georgia RB Dowdell in hospital after ATV accident
stories.summary: Georgia running back Dante Dowdell was involved in an ATV accident and is being treated for serious injuries at a hospital in Atlanta, Bulldogs coach Kirby Smart confirmed to ESPN on Tuesday.

stories.title: Paul: LeBron 'not going to be rushed' into decisio...
stories.summary: Rich Paul, the agent for LeBron James, said Monday he does not know when his client will decide what team he'll play for next season. He added that any teams interested in James joining them do not need to do anything else to sway him in the meantime.

stories.title: Asian Tour joins PGA-Euro alliance in LIV setback
stories.summary: LIV Golf suffered a setback when the PGA Tour, European tour and Asian Tour announced an alliance that is likely to affect the partnership the Asian Tour had with LIV.
